title: Weather Stripping Tape, Doors Windows Draught Excluder Self-Adhesive Anti-Collision Rubber D Type Foam Sealing Tape, Rubber Sound Insulation for Door Window Draught Stopper (Black-10m)
features: ❄【Highly Elastic Sealing Tape】The porous design D-profile window sealing strip can effectively reduce noise. The foam seal Tcan quickly return to its original shape after squeezing and has good cushioning or cushioning performance. It is very suitable for wind, dust, noise and cold protection, protects doors and windows and effectively reduces the wear and noise of doors and windows when opening and closing.

❄【Strong Adhesive】The rubber sealing strip with updated strong grid adhesive backing is not only particularly adhesive and ensures adhesion to any material surface. It is waterproof and non-degumming. After installation, it provides long-term protection.

❄【High Quality】UPSEN window door sealing strip evenly foamed by EPDM, same smooth inside and outside, great flexibility, high load capacity, super durable, unique grid adhesive back, strong grid adhesive backing, firmly glue, give your doors and windows long protection. Please note to clean and dry the surface before applying to achieve better performance.

❄【Multifunction】This door/weather insulation tape with strong load capacity after extrusion, good for anti-collision, ideal for preventing wind, dust, noise, cold, to protect windows and doors, and effectively reduce abrasion and noise on windows/doors when opening and closing.

❄【Size】Comes with 1 Roll, total 10 m (5m/seal x 2 seals). Width: 9 mm, thickness (pitch size): 6 mm. The corresponding gap size is about 3.5 mm to 5 mm. Each roll tape can be divided into 2 seals (5m x 2). The self-adhesive foam tape for door, window, bathroom, shower, sink, various furniture, cars, speakers, toys, crafts, sports equipment, etc.
description: Product Description Premium rubber Multifunctional A must have for sound insulation weather protection strips for your home and office. Block the cold and hot air cross, save energy and reduce electricity costs. Give you a quiet and comfortable living environment Multifunctional door seal strips can be used to protect against wind, dust, noise, water and insects. Easy to install
